reference_impl: Andersson (2019) AEJ:EP 11(4), Section III -- reported values (not a code run)
reference_source: Andersson, J. (2019). Carbon Taxes and CO2 Emissions: Sweden as a Case Study. American Economic Journal: Economic Policy 11(4):1-30.
notes: Path A: mlsynth VanillaSC reproduces Andersson's reported ATT (-0.29) and 2005 gap (-0.35) under his own predictor specification with both the malo (deterministic corner search) and mscmt (seeded differential-evolution V search) backends. The three lagged-CO2 predictors anchor the pre-treatment fit and bring the two V searches into agreement; pop_density (shipped in the data but not one of Andersson's predictors) is excluded. mscmt uses seed=1, mscmt_maxiter=300, mscmt_popsize=15 (stable across seeds).
